Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests

Class TacticTestUtils

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.TacticTestUtils
public class TacticTestUtils extends Object
Utility class for tactic tests.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TacticTestUtils()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    assertFailure(String sequentStr, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent fails and does not modify the proof tree.
    static void
    assertFailure(IProofTreeNode node, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the application of the given tactic fails and does not modify the proof tree.
    static void
    assertFailure(IProverSequent sequent, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent fails and does not modify the proof tree.
    static void
    assertSuccess(String sequentStr, TreeShape expected, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent returns null and that the resulting tree shape is equal to the given expected tree shape.
    static void
    assertSuccess(IProofTreeNode node, TreeShape expected, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the application of the given tactic returns null and that the resulting tree shape is equal to the given expected tree shape.
    static void
    assertSuccess(IProverSequent sequent, TreeShape expected, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent returns null and that the resulting tree shape is equal to the given expected tree shape.
    static void
    assertTacticRegistered(String id, ITactic tactic)
    Asserts that the tactic registry contains a descriptor corresponding to the given id, and that the instance of the tactic attached to this descriptor is equal to the tactic given as parameter.
    static IProofTree
    genProofTree(String... predicateStrings)
    Generates a proof tree from the given predicates, where the last predicate is the goal.
    static IProofTree
    genProofTree(Predicate... predicates)
    Generates a proof tree from the given predicates, where the last predicate is the goal.

    • TacticTestUtils

      public TacticTestUtils()

  • Method Details

    • assertSuccess

      public static void assertSuccess(IProofTreeNode node, TreeShape expected, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the application of the given tactic returns null and that the resulting tree shape is equal to the given expected tree shape.
      Parameters:
      node - the considered proof tree node
      expected - the expected tree shape
      tactic - the tactic to apply

    • assertSuccess

      public static void assertSuccess(IProverSequent sequent, TreeShape expected, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent returns null and that the resulting tree shape is equal to the given expected tree shape.
      Parameters:
      sequent - a proof sequent
      expected - the expected tree shape
      tactic - the tactic to apply

    • assertSuccess

      public static void assertSuccess(String sequentStr, TreeShape expected, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent returns null and that the resulting tree shape is equal to the given expected tree shape.
      Parameters:
      sequentStr - a proof sequent in String form
      expected - the expected tree shape
      tactic - the tactic to apply

    • assertFailure

      public static void assertFailure(IProofTreeNode node, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the application of the given tactic fails and does not modify the proof tree.
      Parameters:
      node - the considered proof tree node
      tactic - the tactic to apply

    • assertFailure

      public static void assertFailure(IProverSequent sequent, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent fails and does not modify the proof tree.
      Parameters:
      sequent - a proof sequent
      tactic - the tactic to apply

    • assertFailure

      public static void assertFailure(String sequentStr, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the application of the given tactic to a proof tree node containing the given sequent fails and does not modify the proof tree.
      Parameters:
      sequentStr - a proof sequent in String form
      tactic - the tactic to apply

    • assertTacticRegistered

      public static void assertTacticRegistered(String id, ITactic tactic)
      Asserts that the tactic registry contains a descriptor corresponding to the given id, and that the instance of the tactic attached to this descriptor is equal to the tactic given as parameter.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the tactic that should be registered
      tactic - the instance of the tactic to compare the runtime class with

    • genProofTree

      public static IProofTree genProofTree(String... predicateStrings)
      Generates a proof tree from the given predicates, where the last predicate is the goal.
      Parameters:
      predicateStrings - predicates as strings (selected hypotheses and goal)
      Returns:
      a proof tree made out of the given predicates

    • genProofTree

      public static IProofTree genProofTree(Predicate... predicates)
      Generates a proof tree from the given predicates, where the last predicate is the goal.
      Parameters:
      predicates - selected hypotheses and then goal
      Returns:
      a proof tree made out of the given predicates
